mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(username, password_hash, real_name, role, can_create_task, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{canCreateTask}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password_hash=#{passwordHash}, real_name=#{realName}, role=#{role}, can_create_task=#{canCreateTask}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET last_seen = NOW(), status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
